reviews.author: surya
reviews.review_body: Solitaire Global Schools, Attapur offers a well-rounded Cambridge International curriculum with strong academics and modern facilities. The school emphasizes holistic development through programs in coding, AI, entrepreneurship, and public speaking. Parents appreciate the safe environment, accessible management, and the focus on nurturing critical thinking and creativity. It is a great choice for students aiming for academic excellence and global exposure.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
I am writing to express my heartfelt appreciation for the exceptional progress my child has made under your guidance. The recent Graduation Day ceremony showcased the students' talents, and I was impressed by the high standard of performances.

Thank you for your dedication, hard work, and commitment to excellence. I feel fortunate to have my child be a part of this educational community.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
The first step in teaching is building a strong bond with students, and the EY teachers have truly created this magic, making every child feel loved and valued. As parents, our initial experience with any school comes with apprehension. However, fast forward a year, and I am now a happy and satisfied parent. My child has shown remarkable progress—gaining confidence, improved handwriting, achieving concept clarity, and actively participating in competitions. This transformation is a testament to the teachers' dedication, motivation, and affectionate approach. EY teachers truly rock! A special mention to Afshan Ma'am for her smooth and effective leadership. Kudos to the entire team!

On Graduation Day, the children were exceptionally well-prepared, delivering outstanding performances. Special appreciation to the tiny tots for their impressive anchoring!

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: We are thoroughly impressed with the school. The school's nurturing environment, combined with its rigorous academic standards, has helped our child grow into a confident and curious learner. The teachers' enthusiasm, creativity, and dedication to their students' success are truly commendable. We appreciate the school's emphasis on values, social skills, and character development, preparing our child for success beyond academics. Thank you Solitaire for all the help and guidance to my child.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: We're thrilled with Solitaire Global Schools! The teachers have been incredibly supportive, taking a genuine interest in our child's progress and offering personalized attention. Their patience, guidance and encouragement have helped build confidence and a love for learning. We appreciate the open communication and regular updates, keeping us informed of our child's growth.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: One of the best school very nice management and teachers are very good and qualified they handle the academics in very well way i just love their management and how they pay attention to the physical activities for kids like swimming football etc etc very nice school!..

reviews.author: shaik rubeen
reviews.review_body: Solitaire is one of the best school in Hyderabad with pure Cambridge curriculum.we are really impressed with your curriculum and teaching methods.Well planned worksheets for practice makes the child think beyond the prescribed books and revision week before the exams is awesome as it will help the learners to prepare themselves at school itself and lessen the Parent's burden.We were searching for a school with Cambridge curriculum and affordable fee .Finally felt that Solitaire is the school which we were looking for .I would like to take this privilege to congratulate the management and teachers for their endless efforts .Thank you nurturing our children's love for  learning.Your commitment to our children's development is invaluable.Thank you once again dedicated Teachers.

reviews.author: KØxWIZZARD
reviews.review_body: Good gym, good service.. nice atmosphere

reviews.author: Nadoosh Khalid
reviews.review_body: Need more efficient and expert teachers

reviews.author: Mohammed Talha Tabrez
reviews.review_body: Improve the road dude.. it's pathetic.. school is good. Quality in education is acceptable.
